name: neku-laptop
description: Commission delivery: pull the sprite from staging, pack it with the gif, upload to the client's Drive folder, get the link.
author: Justin

scripts.shots: cross-env NEKU_MOCK=1 NEKU_SHOT_DIR=shots NEKU_WATCH_DIR=shots/watch electron-vite dev
scripts.shots:photo: cross-env NEKU_MOCK=1 NEKU_PRESET=photo NEKU_SHOT_DIR=shots-photo NEKU_WATCH_DIR=shots-photo/watch electron-vite dev
scripts.shots:wizard: cross-env NEKU_FORCE_SETUP=1 NEKU_WIZARD_DIR=shots-wizard/folder NEKU_SHOT_DIR=shots-wizard electron-vite dev
